title: himantoglossum hircinum var. calcaratum
intro: Himantoglossum hircinum var. calcaratum is a rare and endangered orchid species native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with Himantoglossum hircinum var. calcaratum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and improve digestion. Himantoglossum hircinum var. calcaratum is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine to treat various other health conditions.
